# taikun_robots (Data Source)

Taikun Robot Users Data Source



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Account ID to list robot users for.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (Number) Filter by organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `robots` (List of Object) List of robot users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--robots))

<a id="nestedatt--robots"></a>
### Nested Schema for `robots`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (Number)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `organization_id` (Number)
- `scopes` (List of String)
- `user_id` (String)
